calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Attorneys Fees For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Mar-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Sean Carroll; defendant's agent, appears to oppose petition.

Mr. Carroll states that he did not give notice to opposing counsel that he would be appearing to contest the court's tentative ruling. Mr. Carroll is informed that corporations must be represented by counsel, and that no argument can be heard if no notice is given to the other side. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER AMJAD ASAD'S PETITION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN is GRANTED in the amount of $2,517.50. No opposition filed.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER AMJAD ASAD'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice. Service by mail requires additional 5 days and the POS for personal service indicates that only 11-day Court notice was provided.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
